message:
fix: add mutex protection to NotificationManager for thread safety (gt-vae5f)

Add sync.Mutex to NotificationManager to eliminate TOCTOU races in
file-based state operations. Extract locked helper methods to enable
atomic compound operations. Add SendIfReady() for atomic check-and-send.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
